prompt_used.prompt_used_summary: Structured governance analysis prompt. Must output ONLY valid JSON. Must not guess missing options/results; use UNKNOWN.
prompt_used.prompt_used_excerpt:
You are given:

URL:
https://daodao.zone/dao/injective/proposals/627

EXTRACTED_DATA (may be incomplete):
{
  "source_type": "daodao",
  "fetched_at": "2026-03-27T18:34:52.863Z",
  "title": "OLP Reward Disbursement – Epoch 56",
  "body": "If passed, this proposal confirms the final Open Liquidity Program institutional performance of epoch 56 as well as the distribution of 29380.273 INJ tokens, comprising 14580.364 INJ vested from epoch 53, and 14799.909 INJ representing 50% of the epoch 56 rewards allocation. The remaining OLP rewards from epoch 56 will be disbursed along with the rewards disbursement of epoch 59. The recipient must still be an active participant of the program in order to receive future disbursements. For a further breakdown of rewards, refer to the IPFS link: https://ol

extracted.title: OLP Reward Disbursement – Epoch 56
extracted.body: If passed, this proposal confirms the final Open Liquidity Program institutional performance of epoch 56 as well as the distribution of 29380.273 INJ tokens, comprising 14580.364 INJ vested from epoch 53, and 14799.909 INJ representing 50% of the epoch 56 rewards allocation. The remaining OLP rewards from epoch 56 will be disbursed along with the rewards disbursement of epoch 59. The recipient must still be an active participant of the program in order to receive future disbursements. For a further breakdown of rewards, refer to the IPFS link: https://olp.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmfPemtxCRf2ZdTJWEBSpukGeSUyZ6tc8o95o1CbLrv11n Actions: - By voting yes on this proposal, you support spending 29380.273 INJ tokens from the community pool for the epoch 56 OLP rewards distribution. - By voting no on the proposal, you do not support spending 29380.273 INJ tokens from the community pool for the epoch 56 OLP rewards distribution. - By voting no with veto, you find this proposal to be spam, irrelevant, or malicious to governance, and support burning the 100 INJ deposit if NoWithVeto votes are greater than one-third of the total voting power. - By voting abstain, you wish to contribute to quorum while formally declining to vote either for or against the proposal. Disclosure: I am a member of the Injective Labs team.

analysis.summary: This proposal authorizes spending 29,380.273 INJ from the community pool for Open Liquidity Program (OLP) epoch 56 rewards distribution, combining vested rewards from epoch 53 (14,580.364 INJ) and 50% of epoch 56 rewards (14,799.909 INJ).
key_changes: Spend 29,380.273 INJ from the community pool for OLP rewards distribution
Confirm epoch 56 OLP institutional performance results
Disburse 14,799.909 INJ representing 50% of epoch 56 rewards allocation
risks: Treasury spend of 29,380.273 INJ is irreversible once executed
Continued obligation to future disbursements: remaining epoch 56 rewards deferred to epoch 59 requires future community pool spending
Recipient eligibility for future disbursements is contingent on remaining an active program participant, but current recipient verification is not detailed in proposal text
benefits: Fulfills committed OLP rewards obligations from prior epochs (epoch 53 vesting and epoch 56 allocation)
IPFS link provided for detailed reward breakdown at https://olp.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmfPemtxCRf2ZdTJWEBSpukGeSUyZ6tc8o95o1CbLrv11n
unknowns: Voting options not extracted: text mentions 'yes', 'no', 'no with veto', and 'abstain' but options array is empty
Current voting results unavailable: current_results is null
Cannot verify specific recipient addresses from proposal text
Cannot independently verify OLP performance calculations or reward amounts from on-chain data
Detailed breakdown referenced at IPFS link not verifiable from extracted data
evidence_quotes: distribution of 29380.273 INJ tokens, comprising 14580.364 INJ vested from epoch 53, and 14799.909 INJ representing 50% of the epoch 56 rewards allocation
spending 29380.273 INJ tokens from the community pool for the epoch 56 OLP rewards distribution
The remaining OLP rewards from epoch 56 will be disbursed along with the rewards disbursement of epoch 59
Disclosure: I am a member of the Injective Labs team.

recommendation.reasoning: Treasury risk sensitivity is high and the proposal involves a significant community pool spend of 29,380.273 INJ. While the amounts are clearly specified and an IPFS breakdown is referenced, the voting options were not extracted from the source, making a specific suggestion impossible. As a treasury spend, evidence threshold is elevated. Critical verification gaps exist: recipient addresses, current recipient active status, and the IPFS-linked reward breakdown are not verifiable from extracted data. The undisclosed conflict of interest (proposer is an Injective Labs team member) reduces transparency. Given treasury_risk_sensitivity is high and the recipient identities cannot be verified, this should be treated with elevated scrutiny.
conflicts_with_user_principles: treasury_risk_sensitivity is high but the proposal lacks independent verification of specific recipient addresses and active participant status

limitations: This is not legal or financial advice.
The tool may have failed to extract all proposal parameters.
Critical parameters must be checked manually.

refusal_handling.note: Refusal detection is heuristic and conservative. It routes ambiguous or underspecified cases to human review.
